name: personal-kanban
description: File-based personal kanban board for VSCode

personal-kanban.tags.description: Tag definitions. Each key is a tag name; value is an object with `color` (hex string) and `weight` (number).

personal-kanban.scripts.description: Script definitions used by hooks. Each key is a script name; value is an object with a `file` path (relative to workspace root).

personal-kanban.hooks.description: Event hooks. Each key is an event name (e.g. `card.moved`); value is an array of script names to run.

personal-kanban.tagColorTarget.description: Where to apply tag colors on a card. `tag` colors the tag chip; `card-border` colors the card's left border; `card-background` tints the card background. The dominant tag (highest weight) is used for border and background modes.
